name: Pacifying
description:
This rune turns weapons into instruments of peacemaking.

Activate R (concentrate, mental)

Trigger You damage a creature with the etched weapon

Effect The damaged creature must succeed at a save or be pacified. A pacified creature takes a –2 penalty to attack rolls on any attacks that aren't nonlethal for 1 minute, and the creature also experiences a clear psychic warning that they should stop making attacks that could kill.
